title: Mixture of States: Routing Token-Level Dynamics for Multimodal Generation
core_challenge: effectively aligning textual and visual signals

fusion_strategies.name: Cross-attention methods
fusion_strategies.description: insert new attention blocks into the visual model, projecting text embeddings onto key-value vectors to enable cross-modal token interactions

fusion_strategies.name: Self-attention methods
fusion_strategies.description: concatenate text and visual tokens into a unified sequence, processed by shared attention layers

fusion_strategies.name: MoT (Mixture-of-Transformers)
fusion_strategies.description: establishing layer-wise cross-modal connections by sharing key-value vectors between corresponding text and visual blocks

design_principles: Layer selection should be adaptive, not fixed
Conditional signals should be dynamic and timestep-dependent
